_meta.note: Skeleton — only critical life-safety strings translated. Full translation pending Sprint 9 implementation.

eew.disclaimer: This is a local sensor estimate. Official magnitude is provided by AFAD/Kandilli observatory network.

sos.all_channels_failed: All {{count}} channels failed. Rescue teams are not notified.

notification.permission_benefit_eew: Receive earthquake warnings even when device is on silent
notification.clock_skew_message: Your clock is ~{{minutes}}min off. Messages and SOS may fail to send.

kvkk.title: Data Sharing (KVKK Article 6)
kvkk.subtitle: Your health data is stored only on this device by default. It is NOT uploaded to any server unless you enable the options below.
kvkk.cloud_sync_description: Encrypted backup to Firebase for device recovery
kvkk.backend_share_description: Share with 112/AFAD rescue teams during SOS
